rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MANUELA MESA MARTIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Impose Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Motion: Respondent Douglas Mesa Campbell's motion for order to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents and for sanctions. Tentative Ruling: Grant - no opposition filed. Sanctions are awarded against Contestant Richard S. Martin in the amount of $750.00 + $80.00 costs. Sanction total is $830.00. Moving party to submit proposed order. If any party wishes to contest the tentitave ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at 415/551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on July 5, 2011.
